title: DCP Milestone
description: A stated milestone within a project. 'target_date' is descriptive intent only: DCP derives no deadline state and performs no scheduling. 'missed' is a reported observation, not a DCP-computed verdict.

status.description: State vocabulary (not transitions): planned, in_progress, reached, missed, cancelled. Tolerate-and-pass unknown values.

target_date.description: Descriptive target date (YYYY-MM-DD). NOT a scheduling instruction; DCP performs no scheduling and derives no deadline state.
